interface: GitHub App authentication: RS256 app JWT + REST installation-token exchange (X-GitHub-Api-Version 2026-03-10)

claims.iss: the GitHub App client ID (docs recommend the client ID over the numeric app ID); fixture app: Iv1.8fae12ab34cd56ef
claims.iat: now minus 60 seconds — the documented clock-drift allowance
claims.exp: now plus 540 seconds — the docs cap expiry at no more than 10 minutes into the future; this client pins 9 minutes

app_jwt.usage: Authorization: Bearer <jwt> — JWTs use Bearer, never 'token'
app_jwt.clock: the client reads time only through its injectable Now func

rest_headers.api_version: X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2026-03-10 — the current dated version; 2022-11-28 is only the default for requests that omit the header, and unsupported values get 410 Gone
rest_headers.user_agent: a real product User-Agent is required on every request (Go's default Go-http-client value does not count)

discovery.response: 200, JSON array of installations: {id, app_id, repository_selection, account: {login, type}, app_slug, ...}
discovery.matching: installation is selected by account.login compared case-insensitively; the server's casing is preserved in results
discovery.caching: the installation id for an org never changes — discover once per org, even across token refreshes

token_exchange.auth: app JWT (Bearer) — never an installation token
token_exchange.lifetime: installation access tokens expire after 1 hour (expires_at is authoritative)

cache.policy: an installation token is reused until 60 seconds before its expires_at, then re-exchanged
cache.refresh_jwt: every exchange is signed with a freshly minted JWT (iat/exp derived from the current injected clock)
cache.concurrency: concurrent callers for the same org must share a single in-flight exchange (exactly one POST)

redaction.rule: error text never contains: an installation token (ghs_ prefix), a JWT (eyJ prefix), PEM/private-key material, or any Authorization header value
redaction.surface: API failures decode to a typed error exposing StatusCode and GitHub's message field

test_fixture_notes.installations_page: two installations; the target is account.login Machine-Shop, id 9581, app_id 314159, repository_selection selected
